autumn_winter.properties: Denser, higher mineral content for insulation

kinetic_hardening.mechanic: Hollow tubes filled with microscopic silica crystals
kinetic_hardening.at_rest: Soft, heavy, and drapes like thick velvet
kinetic_hardening.upon_impact: Rigid in milliseconds, becomes soft plate armor

harvesting.danger: Risk of falling or defensive strike by Cloud-Cutter Ray

processing.retting: Soaked in high-altitude mineral springs to dissolve outer husk
processing.spinning: Spun while wet, or it becomes too brittle to work
processing.oil_bath: Soaked in Cloud-Ram Lanolin to keep fibers flexible

military_grade.value: Prized by Iron Caldera and Grey Wardens

luxury_grade.value: Sought after by River Folk merchants and Equine Nobles

dry_rot.description: Becomes brittle and shatters like glass if struck
dry_rot.trigger: Exposure to intense dry heat or fires

weight.description: Significantly heavier than cotton or wool
weight.consequence: Sinks like a stone when swimming
